title: Dungeon Bolt
shortDescription: Explore dungeons, collect gems, defeat enemies in this classic HTML5 adventure!
fullDescription:
Dungeon Bolt is a thrilling browser-based dungeon crawler that tests your strategy, reflexes, and treasure-hunting instincts. Navigate through hand-crafted dungeons, collect powerful gems, battle monsters, and unlock achievements as you descend ever deeper into the darkness.

10+ unique enemy types, achievement system, leaderboard support, and fully optimized for mobile & desktop. Completely free to play.

Built with pure HTML5/JavaScript — fast loading, no downloads required.
